ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot gently holding up a carp streamer, mimicking the light and airy nature of the object. The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the graceful flow of the streamer.  The robot's interaction will be gentle and respectful, reflecting the cultural significance of the carp streamer. Frame 1 will show the robot with both arms outstretched. Frame 2 shows the robot's arms slightly bent and hands open to receive the streamer. Frame 3 will show the robot holding the streamer gently. Frame 4 will show the robot gently lowering the streamer. Frame 5 shows both arms returning to their relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms extend outwards, ready to receive
arms bend slightly, hands open gently
arms hold the streamer with a soft, steady grip
arms slowly lower the streamer with care
arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
